name: Berried Avocado Grapefruit Salad
recipeIngredient: Prepared sweet vinegar and oil dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Line serving platter or individual salad plates with bibb lettuce and watercress.
2. Arrange the avocado, grapefruit, and raspberries over the greens.
3. Sprinkle the salad with prepared sweet vinegar and oil dressing.
